response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song 'Gold Unbalance feat. 中島健人' using on-screen text. 2. Identified performers as Mori Calliope and Kento Nakajima (who is the featured artist). 3. Used search tool to confirm song details and get lyrics for 'Gold Unbalance'. 4. Verified original artist/composer credits in search results. 5. Split video into scenes: performance, performance outro, and merchandise presentation/talk. 6. Constructed final JSON with full lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video begins with a musical performance of 'Gold Unbalance' by Mori Calliope and Kento Nakajima, followed by an outro, and then transitions into a merchandise presentation and commentary by Mori Calliope.

scenes.description: Music video performance of 'Gold Unbalance' featuring Mori Calliope and Kento Nakajima.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In this story of uncertainty,
What we win is our identity.
With this and that,
Changing hands and items,
A sudden passion pierces the heart.
Emotions are non-fiction,
Joy, anger, sorrow, pleasure,
One mind and body,
All-inclusive impulses,
Taste both failure and success.
We are a golden buddy!
In a world that seems to have no meaning,
Light that has accumulated coincidences,
A pulsating heartbeat,
We can't be anyone else,
So let's spin our own words.
Don't underestimate us!
A little bit of courage is enough.
Strongly towards the heights,
Overwhelming climax,
We can do it if there's two of us.
Back-to-back, no matter what,
The things we carry become weapons on the spot.
A shout that reaches far away,
No one can interfere with this route.
1st, 2nd, 3 ways,
A loser from the start,
Greedily enough to be annoying,
Steal the heart from hell.
It's not a loop of reincarnation,
The route is infinite.
It's not a common path,
An expert who prefers the path of thorns,
So laugh grandly now,
A gradation of talent and worldly desires,
If you're going to do it, make it a mess.
If you've started, have the resolve to finish it,
A duet between the loser and the winner.
Inferiority complex,
The absurdity of being cast out,
Shake it off greedily,
The aspiration will not disappear,
We can do it if there's two of us.
What is it to live?
Does the slacker win?
Crush such things,
We can't be just superficial,
Entertain-rider,
Bet your life and run through,
Despair and glory,
Lemme see you fight back.
No matter what happens, nothing will change,
Imprisoned in a memed reality,
This life where we're stuck taking chances,
You're bored of it, aren't you?
We're living in a world with no direction,
Reach out with our light 'till we make a connection,
Tearing the walls apart,
Facing it all, side by side,
Once again, it's us against the world.
Don't underestimate us!
Let your instincts burn,
Show them the real thing,
Overwhelming climax,
Dance in the unbalance!

scenes.description: The performance concludes, and the avatars transition into an outro sequence.
Mori Calliope presents her birthday merchandise and discusses the items. No vocal music is playing.
